title.en: Medical devices — Quality management systems — Requirements for regulatory purposes
title.zh: 医疗器械 - 质量管理体系 - 用于法规的要求

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for a quality management system where an organization needs to demonstrate its ability to provide medical devices that consistently meet applicable regulatory requirements.

Provides guidance on auditing management systems, including principles of auditing, managing an audit programme, conducting management system audits, and competence of auditors. Edition 4, includes remote/hybrid auditing and digital tools.
standards.scope: Auditing guidelines for quality management systems (applicable to ISO 13485 audits).

title.en: Guidance on the application of ISO 13485 to organizations that provide servicing of medical devices
title.zh: 关于将ISO 13485应用于提供医疗器械维修服务的组织的指南

standards.abstract: Provides guidance for organizations that service medical devices on implementing ISO 13485 quality management system requirements.
standards.scope: QMS guidance for medical device servicing organizations.
